characters.appearance: Young female, smooth complexion, brown hair. Distinctive glowing blue lines trace her facial features.
characters.wardrobe: Shiny orange/copper hoodie and large over-ear headphones.

characters.appearance: Young, medium complexion, curly dark hair.
characters.wardrobe: Covered with a patterned blanket featuring red, grey, and white stripes.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: क्या कर रही हो? [What are you doing?]

Character B says: I... sleeping.

Character A says: 'I am sleeping' बोलना चाहिए। थोड़ा formal तरीके से 'I am getting some sleep' भी बोल सकती हो। [You should say 'I am sleeping'. You can also say it a bit more formally as 'I am getting some sleep'.]

Character B says: ओह अच्छा। English कैसे सीखूं? [Oh, I see. How do I learn English?]

Character A says: मेरे साथ रोज़ 15 minutes practice करो, तुम्हारी English में confidence आ जाएगा। [Practice with me for 15 minutes daily, you will gain confidence in your English.]

Character B says: इसमें बहुत खर्चा होगा क्या? मेरे पास इतने पैसे नहीं हैं। [Will this cost a lot? I don't have that much money.]

Character A says: फ़िक्र मत करो, Supernova बहुत affordable है। हज़ारों लोग मेरे साथ रोज़ English बोलना सीख रहे हैं। [Don't worry, Supernova is very affordable. Thousands of people are learning to speak English with me every day.]

Character B says: सुपर! कैसे join करूँ? [Super! How to join?]

Character A says: अभी Supernova app download करो, [Download the Supernova app right now,]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer with a relatable, everyday English mistake.
- Introduces the AI tutor as a friendly, non-judgmental guide.
- Addresses price objections with a reassuring, affordable value proposition rather than gimmicky pricing.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
क्या कर रही हो? (What are you doing?)
I... sleeping.
'I am sleeping' बोलना चाहिए। (You should say 'I am sleeping'.)
थोड़ा formal तरीके से 'I am getting some sleep' भी बोल सकती हो। (You can also say it a bit more formally as 'I am getting some sleep'.)
ओह अच्छा। English कैसे सीखूं? (Oh, I see. How do I learn English?)
मेरे साथ रोज़ (Every day with me)
15 MINUTES
daily practice करो, (do daily practice,)
Confidence
आ जाएगा। (you will gain confidence.)
इसमें बहुत खर्चा होगा क्या? (Will this cost a lot?)
मेरे पास इतने पैसे नहीं हैं। (I don't have that much money.)
Supernova बहुत (Supernova is very)
Affordable
है। (is.)
Thousands
लोग मेरे साथ English बोलना सीख रहे हैं। (people are learning to speak English with me.)
सुपर! कैसे join करूँ? (Super! How to join?)
अभी Supernova app download करो, (Download the Supernova app right now,)

scenes.supernova_script: Character A says: और English बोलना शुरू करो। [and start speaking English.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Shows the app in the app store to build trust.
- Delivers a clear, action-oriented instruction to start learning.
